The wok is sitting on the grates of a white gas stovetop.

spatial: The black wok is centered on the white stovetop. The wooden spoon is inside the wok, mixing the green vegetables. A red pot is visible in the background to the right of the wok.

visible_entities.desc: chopped green leafy vegetables, steaming, wet texture
black frying pan, round, metal handle with wooden grip
wooden spoon, light brown, flat head
white gas stovetop, black metal grates
hand, dark skin tone

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is holding the handle of the frying pan.
A wooden spoon is stirring the green vegetables inside the pan.
Steam is rising from the cooking vegetables.

spatial: The black frying pan is on top of the white gas stovetop. The chopped green vegetables are inside the frying pan. The wooden spoon is inside the pan, mixing the vegetables. A hand is holding the handle of the pan at the bottom right.

atomic_facts.fact: A person is stirring chopped green vegetables in a black frying pan.
The person's right hand holds the handle of the frying pan.
The person's left hand holds a wooden utensil and moves it in a circular motion.
Steam is rising from the vegetables in the pan.
The frying pan is on the front left burner of the stovetop.
A pot with a lid is on the back burner of the stovetop.

spatial: The person is to the right of the frying pan. The frying pan is on the stovetop. The wooden utensil is inside the frying pan. The pot with the lid is behind the frying pan. The tiled wall is to the left of the stovetop.

atomic_facts.fact: A person is stirring chopped green vegetables in a black frying pan with a wooden spoon.
The frying pan is placed on the front left burner of a white gas stovetop.
A black pot containing a yellowish liquid sits on the burner to the right of the frying pan.
A metal lid rests on a pot in the background behind the frying pan.
The person's left hand holds the handle of the frying pan while the right hand stirs.

spatial: The person is positioned to the right of the stove, reaching over the black frying pan which is on the front left burner. The black pot with yellow liquid is to the right of the frying pan. The metal lid is behind the frying pan. The white tiled wall is behind the stovetop, and the wooden floor is below and to the left of the stove.
